en: I feel like this last batch of songs were some of my best. A record deal could change everything.
Maybe I'd settle down, digging some roots. Find me a farmhouse, find me you.
Maybe I wouldn't be already gone again, if it weren't for the wind.
I wouldn't stay wondering what's out there. I wouldn't saddle up on the breeze.
ko: 밖에 무엇이 있는지 궁금해하지 않을 거야.

en: I wouldn't disappear out of thin air. I could put down these wings.
